info.title: Box2BoxConnector
info.description: Connector between partners and Box2Box's ecosystem.

get.summary: Gets a box according to box's id. (Auth)

post.summary: Creates a order according to partner's input. (Auth)
Marks a partner order as completed. (Auth)

get.summary: Gets a paginated list of orders. (Auth)

parameters.name: subPartnerIdFilter
parameters.description:
(Optional) Filters orders by sub-partner identifier.
If not provided, orders from all sub-partners are returned.

get.summary: Gets the PDF label for a specific order and sub-partner (default if not filled in). (Auth)

parameters.name: subPartnerId
parameters.description:
(Optional) The sub-partner identifier. 
If not provided the default sub-partner is used.

get.summary: Gets the tracking URL for a specific order and sub-partner (default if not filled in). (Auth)

parameters.name: subPartnerId
parameters.description:
(Optional) The sub-partner identifier.
If not provided the default sub-partner is used.

post.description:
This endpoint uses JSON Merge Patch-like semantics for nullable request fields.
Omitting a field preserves the stored value, sending `null` clears the stored value,
and sending a concrete value updates the stored value.
            
The tri-state handling is implemented server-side through a custom wrapper,
but clients send plain JSON scalar values or `null` only. Do not send wrapper objects.
            
Sample request:
            
    POST api/v1/subpartner/upsert
    {
        "subPartnerId": "my-shop",
        "displayName": "My Shop",
        "companyName": "My Shop s.r.o.",
        "url": "https://myshop.cz",
        "contactPhonePrefix": "+420",
        "contactPhone": "777123456",
        "contactEmail": "info@myshop.cz",
        "city": "Prague",
        "street": "Wenceslas Square",
        "houseNumber": "1",
        "zipCode": "11000",
        "ic": "12345670",
        "dic": "CZ12345670",
        "iban": "CZ6508000000192000145399",
        "isEnabled": true
    }

JSON Merge Patch-like semantics apply to nullable request fields: omit a property to preserve the stored value, send null to clear it, or send a concrete value to update it. The server binds these fields through PatchField<T>, but clients must send plain JSON values or null, not wrapper objects.

streetWithNumber.description: Street and number where box is placed.

zip.description: Zip code of location where box is placed.

acceptsCardPayment.description: Whether it is possible to pay by card.

recipientBoxId.description: Identification of AlzaBox partner wants to send the package to.

lat.description: Geo location where box is placed.

lng.description: Geo location where box is placed.

base64SerializedLabel.description: Label serialized in Base64 string in PDF format.

recipientBoxId.description: Identification of AlzaBox partner wants to send the package to.

openerKey.description: Unified Alza-side order identifier (the order's opener key).

senderPin.description: Pin for sender to let the package in.

totalCount.description: Total count of items in the system. This is used for pagination.

OrderResponsePaginatedResponse.description: Paginated response containing a page of items and total count.

depth.description:
Depth of the package in cm.
Allowed precision is 9 and scale 1.
Allowed values are from 0.1 to 99_999_999.9 cm
with up to one digit allowed to the right of the decimal point.

height.description:
Height of the package in cm.
Allowed precision is 9 and scale 1.
Allowed values are from 0.1 to 99_999_999.9 cm
with up to one digit allowed to the right of the decimal point.

width.description:
Width of the package in cm.
Allowed precision is 9 and scale 1.
Allowed values are from 0.1 to 99_999_999.9 cm
with up to one digit allowed to the right of the decimal point.

weight.description:
Weight of the package in kg.
Allowed precision is 9 and scale 3.
Allowed values are from 0.001 to 999_999.999 kg
with up to three digits allowed to the right of the decimal point.

currency.description:
Currency of payment.
Use the top-level Konzole.Box2BoxConnector.ApiModel.Order.OrderBase.Currency field instead.

refundBankNumber.description: Bank number of account to refund.

companyName.description: Legal company name of the sub-partner.

url.description: Public website URL of the sub-partner.

city.description: City of the sub-partner's registered address.

street.description: Street of the sub-partner's registered address.

houseNumber.description: House number of the sub-partner's registered address.

zipCode.description: Zip code of the sub-partner's registered address.

SubpartnerUpsertRequest.description: Request DTO for upserting a sub-partner.

operation.description: Whether the sub-partner record was `created` or `updated`.

SubpartnerUpsertResponse.description: Response for a sub-partner upsert operation.

TrackingUrlResponse.description: Response wrapper for the Tracking URL of an order.

OAuth2.description:
IMPORTANT NOTE: If you do not specify any scope in the authentication request
                        then generated access token gets all scopes the specified client_id is authorized for.
                        This behavior is by design by Duende.

Bearer.description: Please enter access token directly as an alternative to previous approaches
